package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerIoOperationsSmallWritesWithoutBufioWriter() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_io_operations_small_writes_without_bufio_writer"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: I/O operations. Flag many Write calls to files or network connections without bufio buffering."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
